name: Paycor HCM API
what_it_does: Paycor REST API for human capital management (HCM) and payroll platform. Enables AI agents to manage employee data, process payroll, track time and attendance, administer benefits, handle recruiting and onboarding, and integrate Paycor HR data with business systems. Paycor serves small-to-large businesses in the US with a unified HR, payroll, and talent platform.
use_cases: Syncing employee data and org structure from HRIS integration agents
Querying payroll and compensation data from finance integration agents
Managing time and attendance from workforce management agents
Processing new hire onboarding data from HR automation agents
not_for: Global payroll outside the US (Paycor is US-only)
Enterprise global HCM without mid-market SMB focus
Simple time tracking without full HCM integration
best_when: A US-based mid-market business using Paycor wants AI agents to sync employee data, query payroll information, and integrate HR workflows with other business systems.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Payroll and HR data is among the most sensitive personal data. Tax, compensation, and benefit information requires strict access control.

auth.notes: Paycor uses OAuth 2.0 with authorization code flow for partner integrations. Scopes are available for different HR data domains. Partner program registration required for API access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-employee-per-month pricing for Paycor platform
pricing.paid_tiers: Paycor Basic, Essential, Core, Complete plans with API access for integrations
pricing.notes: US-only HCM platform. Publicly traded (PYCR). Developer partner program with sandbox. Pricing per employee per month based on module tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per partner app; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Payroll, tax, and HR data is highly sensitive — restrict access to minimum needed
No public MCP server — REST API via partner developer program
US-only — not suitable for global HCM requirements
Partner program approval required before API access
Payroll data includes W-2 and tax withholding — extreme sensitivity
Employee SSN and financial data — PII with strict legal requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Payroll, compensation, and HR data is highly sensitive PII. SOC2. US-only. OAuth2 with scopes. Partner approval required. SSN and financial data in scope.

security_score_components.security_notes: Highly sensitive payroll and HR data including SSN and tax info. SOC2. US-only. OAuth2 with scopes.
